options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all or specified options to default value

options.name: -allowAnalysisOnly
options.description: Allow analysis only flow

options.name: -allowBitConnection
options.description: Whether to create instance terminal creations bitwise, if bus not found in OA.

options.name: -allowTechUpdate
options.description: Whether to allow the tech.db to be updated or not.

options.name: -bindkeyFile
options.description: Virtuoso bind key file

options.name: -compressLevel
options.description: OA Database compression level

options.name: -convertTo
options.description: Whether to convert non-conforming pathsegs/paths to polygon or convert the endStyle to truncate on orthogonal and to custom on diagonal pathsegs

options.name: -cutRows
options.description: Whether to use cutRows or not

options.name: -displayDrfFile
options.description: Display resource file

options.name: -displayDrfInLibrary
options.description: Whether to use display resource file in the tech library

options.name: -drcFillPurpose
options.description: Whether to save drcFill shapes to gap_fill or drawing purpose. By default DEF routes with + SHAPE DRCFILL are mapped to the OA 'gapFill' purpose. Some OA techfiles do not have this purpose defined, and require these shapes be mapped to 'drawing' purpose. In that case, they get an additional internal attribute so they can round-trip back to DRCFILL shapes properly.

options.name: -encloseQuickAbstractPins
options.description: Include shapes that enclose layout pin shapes

options.name: -fullLayerList
options.description: Whether to support full list of layer import

options.name: -fullPath
options.description: Whether to use full path or not

options.name: -hybridRows
options.description: Read hybrid rows from PDK

options.name: -instPlacedIfUnknown
options.description: Whether to map OA Placement status oacNonePlacementStatus of an instance to Placed(true)/ Unplaced(false).

options.name: -libCreateMode
options.description: {none|attach|copy|reference} Library creation method during saveDesign for newly created libraries

options.name: -locking
options.description: Whether to lock the OA database during restoreDesign

options.name: -logicOnlyImport
options.description: Whether to run oaIn after init_design or not

options.name: -merge_trim
options.description: Merge the trim metal shapes during save when the trim metal gap less than or equal to the max_gap in micron.

options.name: -nonRectilinearShapes
options.description: {bbox|approximate} Translates non-rectilinear shapes to rectilinear shapes.

options.name: -pinPurpose
options.description: Whether to set Pin Purpose as Pin or not

options.name: -pushPinConstraint
options.description: whether saveDesign to push interoperable pin constraint into its corresponding blackbox abstract cellview. Note: Interoperable pin constraint means pin constraints that are understood by Innovus, Virtuoso and PVS.

options.name: -quickAbstractForCustomCells
options.description: {pcells|stdcells|all|off} Trim design shapes of Custom Cells

options.name: -readSystemReservedLayers
options.description: {all|text|off} Read system reserved layers from PDK

options.name: -saveCdsFixedVias
options.description: Save fixed via

options.name: -saveMaskDataLocked
options.description: Whether to save colored shapes with locked attribute

options.name: -saveNetVoltage
options.description: Whether to allow saveDesign to write voltage information to the oaBitNet's voltage attribute

options.name: -saveRelativePath
options.description: Whether to save relative path in config file.

options.name: -saveRestoreFile
options.description: Whether to save the view.inn file

options.name: -silently_ignore_unsupported_vias
options.description: {true|false} Whether restoreDesign should issue messages about vias that are not supported in Innovus.

options.name: -textPurpose
options.description: Specify the purpose name that will be used when text labels (add_text) are written.

options.name: -tieNet
options.description: tieHigh tieLow net names

options.name: -updateMode
options.description: Whether to use (save/restore)OaDesign in update mode or not

options.name: -useVirtuosoBindkey
options.description: Whether to use Virtuoso bind keys

options.name: -useVirtuosoColor
options.description: Whether to use Virtuoso color and stipple

options.name: -viewSubType
options.description: Subtype of view of the OA design
